question: What deep learning architectures are suggested for capturing complex sequential dependencies in high-frequency financial data?
answer: Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) networks and Transformer-based architectures
context_source: Future studies should explore models such as Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) networks and Transformer-based architectures, which have demonstrated strong performance in time-series forecasting tasks.
topic: Financial Time Series Analysis and Prediction
context_excerpt: [2412.15448v2-chunk-0021] Further, advances in deep learning architectures present an opportunity to capture complex sequential dependencies in high-frequency financial data. Future studies should explore models such as Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) networks and Transformer-based architectures, which have demonstrated strong performance in time-series forecasting tasks.
